Title: Enacts the New York mosquito surveillance act
Summary: Direct the commissioner of environmental conservation to establish a New York mosquito surveillance task force to study and assess the future of mosquito surveillance in the state; directs a plan to be submitted after one year of effectiveness; directs counties to develop and submit plans of action to begin, continue, or expand mosquito surveillance.
ActClause: AN ACT to enact the "New York mosquito surveillance act"
